snippet.title: Westfjords Workshop
snippet.description: A fishing captain's workshop logs from Isafjordur. Building a 1:20 scale model of my grandfather's trawler, maintaining the FV Sjonarhorn, and reading the North Atlantic weather. Posted when the sea lets me.

channel.title: Westfjords Workshop
channel.description: Model shipbuilding and vessel maintenance from a working trawler captain in the Icelandic Westfjords.
channel.keywords: model ship build scale trawler fishing vessel maintenance westfjords iceland north atlantic seamanship
